name: Bulgarian Split Squats
description: Keep torso upright. Front knee tracks over foot, not past toes. Drive through the heel.
progressionPath: Add Pause → Add Weight → Jump Variation

name: Tempo Pushups
description: Elbows at 45 degrees, not flared out. Core tight, body in a straight line from head to heels.

name: Doorway / Table Rows
description: Squeeze shoulder blades together at the top. Keep hips from sagging.
progressionPath: Lower Body Angle → Single Arm → Add Weight Vest

name: Pike Pushups
description: Hips high in an inverted V. Lower the top of your head towards the floor, not your face.
progressionPath: Elevate Feet → Wall Handstand Hold → Wall Handstand Pushup

name: Nordic Hamstring Curls
description: Lower your torso as slowly as possible. Keep a straight line from knees to head. Catch yourself with your hands.
progressionPath: Increase Negative Time → Add Band Assistance → Full Nordic

name: Single-Leg Glute Bridge
description: Drive through the heel of the planted foot. Squeeze the glute hard for 2 seconds at the top. Keep hips level.
progressionPath: Elevate Shoulders → Add Weight on Hips → Add Pause at Top

name: Plank to Pushup
description: Minimize hip rocking as you move from plank to pushup position and back. Alternate leading arm.

name: Hollow Body Hold
description: Press lower back firmly into the floor. The lower your legs and arms, the harder it is. No arch in the back.
progressionPath: Tuck → One Leg Extended → Full Hollow → Add Rocking Motion

name: Archer Pushups
description: Wide hand position. As you lower, shift your weight to one side, keeping the other arm straight.
progressionPath: Increase ROM → Elevate Feet → Transition to One-Arm Negative

name: Pistol Squat Negatives
description: Stand on one leg, slowly lower yourself to a seated position on a chair. Use both legs to stand up and repeat.
progressionPath: Lower Chair Height → Assisted Pistol → Full Pistol Squat

name: Single-Leg Calf Raises
description: Stand on the edge of a step. Full range of motion — deep stretch at the bottom, hard squeeze at the top.
progressionPath: Add Weight → Bent Knee Variation (Soleus focus)
